name: Tofu Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, cut into matchstick sized pieces
4 oz can Chopped green chilies, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place tofu, onions, and green pepper in a 9x13 inch baking pan.
2. In a small bowl, combine remaining ingredients (except tortillas), mixing well.
3. Pour the mixture over the tofu mixture.
4. Cover the pan, and refrigerate for 4-5 hours, gently stirring the tofu mixture occasionally.
5. To cook: Wrap tortillas tightly in aluminum foil and heat in a 350°F oven for 10 minutes.
6. Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Drain the tofu mixture (reserving marinade) and place it in the skillet.
7. Cook, stirring gently, until vegetables are slightly tender. Add marinade a little at a time to keep the mixture from sticking. If you prefer a juicy fajita filling, add all of the marinade.
8. To serve, spoon tofu filling into the center of heated tortillas, roll, and enjoy. Serves 6.
